---
pagetitle: "Yueswater Blog"
lang: zh-TW
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
editor: source
sidebar: false
search: false
repo-actions: false
description: |
  Anthony 的個人部落格——Python、R、LaTeX 教學，以及專案與生活筆記。
image: images/og-image.png
listing:
  - id: latest-articles
    contents:
    - articles/posts
    - "!index.qmd"
    - "!articles/posts/**/*-en.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: latest-projects
    contents:
    - projects/posts
    - "!index.qmd"
    - "!projects/posts/**/*-en.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

  - id: latest-diary
    contents:
    - diary/posts
    - "!index.qmd"
    - "!diary/posts/**/*-en.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false

toc: false
alternate-lang: "/index-en.html"
---

::: {.pullout-text}
::: {.pullout-container}
::: {.pullout-block .black-background}
![](images/quote-purple.png){width="100px"}

## 良程之作，機行其迅；<br>人讀其文，義理自明。
Donald Knuth，《電腦程式設計藝術》

::: {.button}
[閱讀文章](articles/index.qmd)
:::

:::
:::
:::

::: {.header-text}
::: {.content-container}
::: {.header-block}
**Anthony** 的個人部落格──**Python**、**R**、**LaTeX** 教學，還有我做過的專案和日常生活的隻字片語。保持好奇。
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="articles/index.qmd">

## 文章
</a>

::: {#latest-articles}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="projects/index.qmd">

## 專案
</a>

::: {#latest-projects}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="diary/index.qmd">

## 日記
</a>

::: {#latest-diary}
:::

:::
:::
